verification.notes: Official page verifies map identity, key landmarks, and major features; detailed vehicle/loot routes still require manual in-game verification.

locations.name: Pecado

vehicles.name: Arena Road
vehicles.description: Check the road outside the arena for fast desert rotations.

vehicles.name: Casino Garage
vehicles.description: Garage-side spawn gives cover before leaving town.

loot.notes: Excellent gear but almost always contested.

locations.description: Classic Miramar hot drop with immediate close-range fighting.

locations.name: Hacienda del Patron

vehicles.name: Front Road
vehicles.description: Fast car pickup on the main road toward San Martin.

vehicles.name: North Compound
vehicles.description: Secondary vehicle check when Hacienda is crowded.

route: exit front road or north compound
loot.notes: Small area, fast fights, high reward.

locations.description: Tiny high-tier mansion with very little reset space.

locations.name: Los Leones
aliases: ลอสเลโอเนส

vehicles.name: South Highway
vehicles.description: Multiple road checks along the south edge.

vehicles.name: Construction Road
vehicles.description: Useful for rotating out after looting construction.

loot.notes: Large enough to split safely if the plane path is busy.

locations.description: Largest city on Miramar with long sight lines and many angles.

locations.name: Power Grid

vehicles.name: West Road
vehicles.description: Road spawn for rotations to Pecado or Chumacera.

vehicles.name: Hill Compound
vehicles.description: Check the compound above Power Grid for a safer vehicle.

route: hold hill compound or rotate west
loot.notes: Good central position with manageable contest rate.

locations.description: Flexible central drop with decent loot and good vehicle access.

locations.name: Valle del Mar

vehicles.name: Bridge Road
vehicles.description: Primary car line for island and mainland rotations.

vehicles.name: West Coast Road
vehicles.description: Backup spawn toward Chumacera and coastal compounds.

loot.notes: Lower loot ceiling but strong for safe edge starts.

locations.description: Quiet coastal town with bridge control value.

secret_rooms.name: Miramar Secret Rooms
locations: South of Oasis / north of Water Treatment
West of El Pozo, near Alcantara road
Southwest of El Pozo, west of Monte Nuevo
West of Hacienda del Patron / north of Pecado
West of Truck Stop / south of El Azahar
East of Monte Nuevo, north of Pecado hills
Northwest of Los Leones, south of Chumacera
secret_rooms.loot: High-value secret-room loot inside abandoned mine entrances; verify current live loot tables before treating item contents as guaranteed.
secret_rooms.notes: Callouts transcribed from the Steam guide map updated in May 2026. The guide says locations were manually verified in Aug-Oct 2025 and May 2026.

verification.notes: Guide-level verification is newer than the previous Reddit image source. Promote to high only after PC live/PUBG Bridge spot checks.
